feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.task_description: Make nf:mcp-repair discover slot names dynamically from ~/.claude.json mcpServers instead of hardcoding them
feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.approach: Update nf:mcp-repair to dynamically discover slot names and corresponding MCP tool names from ~/.claude.json mcpServers instead of hardcoding the allowed-tools list and Step 1 direct MCP tool calls.
out_of_scope: Changing the overall 4-step diagnosis workflow structure or classification logic
Implementing persistent slot name caching or state files
Creating a general-purpose slot discovery utility outside of mcp-repair.md
Converting the skill to use Task() sub-agents
feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.risk_reason: Updates mcp-repair.md workflow to dynamically discover MCP tool names from ~/.claude.json mcpServers, affecting Step 1 diagnosis and Step 4 auto-repair logic across 3+ locations.
